lks2.objective: Fielders combine passes and accurate throws to hit the batter below the waist; batter defends with the bat.
successCriteria: Fielders pass to a better angle before throwing
Batter keeps the bat low and ready

uks2.objective: Develop tactical throwing — pass to create unguarded angles; batter reads body position to anticipate the throw.
successCriteria: Team coordinates to attack from the batter's blind side
Throws use deception (look one way, throw another)
Batter pivots and tracks the ball

space.description: A circle 6–8m across. Batter in the middle, fielders on the boundary.

steps: The fielders on the outside must pass the ball between themselves and try to hit the batter below the waist.
The batter can strike the ball to protect themselves.
The batter can be caught out.
questions: How can the fielders work together to get the batter out?
What is the best body position for taking a shot?

step.equipment: Add a wicket to protect as well

errors.issue: Swinging across the line of the ball
errors.fix: Cue 'bat travels THROUGH the ball, not across it'

errors.cause: Looking where the ball will GO
errors.fix: Cue 'eyes on impact — THEN look up'
